noSyncServers: No sync servers configured for this workspace.
addSyncServerDescription: Add a sync server to keep your workspace data synchronized across devices.
configureSyncServer: Configure a sync server for this workspace.
automaticDescription: Maintains a persistent connection and syncs changes in real-time.
manualDescription: Connect on-demand when you click "Sync Now".
name: Name
authenticationFailed: Authentication failed — check your access token
importFromJsonDescription: Restore projects, tasks, backgrounds, and logos from a Tasks JSON export
importFromKanriDescription: Import a single board or an entire workspace from a Kanri JSON export
importFromCsvDescription: Import tasks into a new project from a CSV file
importFromAsanaDescription: Import projects and tasks from Asana
importFromTrelloDescription: Import boards and cards from Trello
importFromJiraDescription: Import projects and issues from JIRA
csvImportDescription: Choose a name for the imported project.
exportProjectToKanriDescription: Export a single project as a Kanri board JSON file
exportWorkspaceToKanriDescription: Export all projects as a Kanri workspace JSON file
exportProjectsToJsonDescription: Export selected projects in the app's native JSON format
exportTasksToCsvDescription: Export tasks from a project as a CSV spreadsheet
exportProjectToKanriDialogDescription: Select a project to export as a Kanri board JSON file
exportTasksToCsvDialogDescription: Select a project whose tasks will be exported as CSV
exportWorkspaceToKanriDialogDescription: Select projects to include in the Kanri workspace export
exportProjectsToJsonDialogDescription: Select projects to export in native JSON format
cloudSyncDisabledForWorkspace: This workspace is not synced to the cloud.
cloudSyncEnabledForWorkspace: This workspace is synced to the cloud.
cloudSyncSignedOutWarning: Cloud sync is enabled but you are signed out.
